LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, JAN-05-2021 HEARING HELD RE: PLAINTIFF HONGGUO LI'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF CIVIL CODE SECTION 1723 IS DENIED. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING.) DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE DEC-03-2020 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF HONGGUO LI'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF NEVER OBTAINED AN ORDER TO ALLOW THIS MOTION TO BE HEARD LESS THAN 30 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE. (SEE CODE CIV. PROC. SEC. 437C(A)(3).) SUCH AN ORDER MUST BE OBTAINED BEFORE THE MOTION IS FILED. (ROBINSON V. WOODS (2008) 168 CAL.APP.4TH 1258, 1268 [NOTICE OF HEARING ON MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT "INVALID" UNTIL COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO HEAR MOTION WITHIN 30 DAYS OF TRIAL DATE].) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

Off Calendar Jan-05-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERNCE):
Atty. J. JAMES LI, Esq. of Lilaw Inc. (Tel: 650-521-5956) for plaintiff Hongguo William Li;
Atty. SHELLEY S. BUCHANAN, Esq. (Tel: 628-256-3493) for Defendant Venezia Fine Arts & Antiques, LLC.

Hearing Re: Plaintiff Hongguo Li's Motion For Summary Adjudication.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's motion for summary adjudication of the first cause of action for violation of Civil Code section 1723 is denied.

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Defendant is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and complies with CRC 3.1312.

Off Calendar Dec-07-2020 Continued To Mar-03-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Dec-03-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF HONGGUO LI'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Off calendar. Plaintiff never obtained an order to allow this motion to be heard less than 30 days before the trial date. (See Code Civ. Proc. sec. 437c(a)(3).) Such an order must be obtained before the motion is filed. (Robinson v. Woods (2008) 168 Cal.App.4th 1258, 1268 [notice of hearing on motion for summary judgment "invalid" until court finds good cause to hear motion within 30 days of trial date].)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
